gender: Gender concept name from OMOP vocabulary
race: Race concept name from OMOP vocabulary
ethnicity: Ethnicity concept name from OMOP vocabulary
age_at_diagnosis: Age in years at cancer diagnosis
cancer_type: Cancer type label (e.g. NSCLC, Bladder, Kidney, Melanoma, or OMOP concept name)
diagnosis_date: First cancer diagnosis date (OMOP-derived, date shifted)
ici_start_date: Date of first ICI drug exposure (date shifted)
ici_type: ICI agent class (e.g. PD-1, PD-L1, CTLA-4)
block_number: Sequential ICI treatment block number per patient
ici_block_start_date: Start date of this ICI treatment block (date shifted)
ici_discontinuation_date: End date of this ICI treatment block (date shifted)
ici_discontinuation_cause: Cause of ICI discontinuation (e.g. DEATH, CENSORED, TOXICITY, PROGRESSION, COMPLETION)
is_deceased: Indicates whether the patient has a death date
time_on_ici: Days from ICI block start to discontinuation
time_to_death_or_censor: Days from cancer diagnosis to death or censoring
lab_value_final: Final lab value used for analysis (converted if possible)
days_relative_to_diagnosis: Days from cancer diagnosis to measurement date
days_relative_to_ici_start: Days from first ICI start to measurement date
days_relative_to_ici_discontinuation: Days from ICI block discontinuation to measurement date
days_relative_to_last_followup: Days from last follow-up to measurement date
